<table border="1" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="400">
<tr>
<td>
<table border="0" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="100%">
<tr>
<th align="center" colspan="2" style="background:#cef2e0;" width="25">  Notice
</th></tr>
<tr>
<td style="background:#cef2e0;" width="20">
</td><td align="center"> This article is about a clan that is considered active. Any featured information may be outdated due to events in the clan. Feel free to correct any inaccuracies.
</td></tr></table>
</td></tr></table>

'''Flowers of Happiness''' ('''[FoH]''')

== Members ==
=== Founders/leaders ===
* rambake
* Mc Hammer

=== Co-leaders ===
* Cumiques.
* Bolt
* Papuu

=== Other members ===
* Pelimies
* $ome

* FoH is not fair - get used to it
* If you mess up, it's not your parents' fault, so don't whine about your mistakes, learn from them.
* If you ask a question you don't want an answer to, expect an answer you don't want to hear.
* Be nice to your clan mates
* Respect your leaders

== Clan wars ==
[FoH] vs [aC] 2-0 many times

[[Category:Clans]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721135145/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Flowers_of_Happiness -->
